title.en: But now, these treasures are all owned by Ye Ti...

content.en:
When many of the Eternal Masters of the Origin Realm Sea were shocked by the fall of the Black Ancestor, Ye Tian was sorting out the treasures of the Black Ancestor.

I have to say that Black Ancestor, as the top Ten Realm-level controller of the Origin Realm Sea, is still very wealthy, but many of them are afraid that they come from other eternal controllers.

But now, these treasures are all owned by Ye Tian personally.

Time passed slowly, and the treasures of the Black Ancestor were gradually sorted out by Ye Tian.

Suddenly.

A map caught Ye Tian's attention.

This map contains many changes, and ordinary eternal controllers are afraid that they will not be able to understand this map, but Ye Tian quickly understood it.

"This is a place in an area at the end of the realm, and there are many places marked!" Ye Tian said in surprise.

Moreover, this is not the Boundary Rim area near the Origin Boundary Sea, but the depths of the Boundary Rim far away from the Origin Boundary Sea, and you must use the map to lock this area, otherwise you will not be able to find this area.

"Was it the map that the Black Ancestor obtained, or was it the map obtained by some of the Eternal Masters who was killed by the Black Ancestor?"

Ye Tian didn't know what kind of situation it was, but this map belonged to him at the moment.

If he has time, he's going to take a look at the area where the map is located, and maybe he'll find something good.

After all, if it was something of no value, the owner of the map would not have made it.

Since the other party has created this map, it must mean that it is very important.

......

"Senior Brother Black Decay, Senior Brother Ancient Demon, they are here!"

Ye Tian smiled slightly, he knew what these senior brothers were here to do, they must be asking about Hei Zu's situation.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian immediately went to see a few of them.

Soon, the brothers and sisters met.

"Little junior brother, did you really kill Heizu?"

As soon as the Black Decay Controller saw Ye Tian, he was shocked.

"Yes!" Ye Tian nodded slightly.

Suddenly, the Black Decay Controller and the Ancient Demon Controller gasped.

Although they all knew the result, they were still shocked when Ye Tian said it himself.

"Little junior brother, your progress speed is too terrifying, it's only been a long time, and you can actually kill Hei Zu. The Black Decay Controller was extremely surprised, "My strength is actually a little worse than that of Black Ancestor, junior brother, your current strength can kill me!"

"Junior Brother, Black Ancestor is already the ultimate of the Ten Realm-level masters, you can even kill him!" the Ancient Demon Controller exclaimed.

Ye Tian smiled and said, "I have created a technique that surpasses the top Origin Control Technique, which I call the Perfect Control Technique. "

"Little junior brother, you created that kind of skill so quickly?"

The Black Decay Controller became interested and wanted to see Ye Tian's perfect control technique.

Immediately, everyone came to the end of the world.

Ye Tian showed his Ten Thousand Dao Blades here.

I saw that Ye Tian urged the perfect body, and immediately cast ten thousand blades, and this blow was struck, which directly caused the expressions of the ancient demon controller and the black decay controller to change drastically.

"What a horrible attack!"

The Black Immortal Controller knew very well that this Perfect Control Technique was similar to his Immortal Spear, but Ye Tian's Ten Thousand Dao Blade combined with the Perfect Body, the power that erupted was many times more powerful than his Immortal Spear.

"In addition, I have mastered the changes of the Dao of Space to a billion kinds!"

As he spoke, Ye Tian showed the spatial imprint again.

At this moment, the Black Decay Controller was dumbfounded.

"Junior Brother, you have mastered the changes of the Dao of Space to a billion kinds, how did you do this?" the Black Decay Controller looked incredulous.

"Talent!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

"After mastering a billion kinds of Dao changes, this kind of imprint will be formed. It's a pity that I'm still far from a billion variations, and it's too difficult to master a billion variations!" the Ancient Demon Controller shook his head.

"It's really too difficult, I'm afraid that even Heizu hasn't done it. The Black Rotten Ruler said.

Then, the Black Decay Controller and the Ancient Demon Controller didn't stay long before they left one by one.

They are afraid that if they stay here for a long time, they will be stimulated by Ye Tian to shut up!

But soon after, the Snow Maiden Controller also came, but he didn't stay long, just asked about the Black Ancestor.

......

Beyond the Sea of the Origin Realm, the End of the Realm.

The Ten Elements Ancestor, the Primordial Ancestor, naturally also knew about the killing of the Black Ancestor.

"Hahaha, Primordial Ancestor, it's still my disciple Ye Tian, kill the Black Ancestor!" said the Ten Elements Ancestor very proudly.

The Primordial Ancestor was a little surprised, "Your fifth disciple Ye Tian, you haven't been practicing for long, you can even kill the Black Ancestor." Ten Realm-level Controllers, almost no one can kill Black Ancestor, it is too difficult to kill Black Ancestor, Black Ancestor himself is the top existence of Ten Realm-level Controllers, and only those of us who are strong beyond the Ten Realm-level Controllers can easily kill Black Ancestor. Could it be that your five disciples have broken through?"

"Naturally, there is no breakthrough, if he breaks through, he will not be able to stay in the Origin Realm Sea!"

"That's right, the Origin Realm Sea only allows the existence of Ten Realm-level controllers at most. Your five disciples killed the Black Ancestor in the Ten Realms-level masters, this is indeed incredible!"

The Ten Elements Ancestor said proudly: "My disciple Ye Tian has a great hope of reaching our level in the future, maybe the hope of opening up the next realm depends on him!"

"Hehe, that's it, which of us doesn't go against the sky? But we still can't reach the next realm, so we can only find another way to improve our strength. "Primordial Ancestor Dao.

"Then wait, my disciple will definitely surprise us!"

Ten Xingzu said with a smile.

......

Time passed, and the entire Origin Realm Sea knew that the Black Ancestor had been killed by the Endless Master.

As a result, many of the Eternal Masters have returned from the end of the realm, and the entire Origin Realm Sea has regained its calm.

And Ye Tian was also slowly cultivating and didn't do anything else.

this day.

The Primordial Ruler has come to the White Styx Mountain.

"What are you going to do, Primordial Master?"

The White Immortal Controller was nervous.

"What are you doing? Naturally, I want to kill you, and it was you who released the Black Ancestor. Now that the Black Ancestor is dead, do you think you can be safe?" said the Primordial Master.

"I've also been bewitched by the Black Ancestor!"

The White Immortal Master still wanted to explain, but the Primordial Controller didn't give him a chance and directly attacked.

Thundered!!!

A big war begins.

However, the White Immortal Controller is no match at all.

In a short time, the White Immortal Controller was severely damaged.

Just as he was about to escape, an arrow came through the endless time and space, directly hitting the White Immortal Controller.

"Jin Yu Controller !!"

The White Immortal Controller was shocked.

The number one marksman of the Origin Realm Sea, the controller of the Ten Realms level Jin Yu, is stronger than him.

Unexpectedly, this one also made a move, completely cutting off his hope of escaping.

With this one's shot, one arrow can lock any place in the Origin Realm Sea.

"Die!"

The Primordial Controller struck again, shattering the body of the White Immortal Controller with a single blow.

At this point, the master of the White Shadow completely fell and died.

After all, this time, many eternal masters of the Origin Realm Sea were killed by the Black Ancestor, although the Black Ancestor died, someone needed to take the blame, and the White Immortal controller was the one who carried the blame.

This time, attacking and killing the White Immortal Controller is not the meaning of the original controller alone, but also the meaning of many eternal controllers.

Next, those eternal controllers who returned to the Black Ancestor were also purged at this time, and they were besieged and killed one by one.

And all this has nothing to do with Ye Tian.

Not long after, Ye Tian was going to go to the location on Heizu's map to see what was there.

Thereupon.

He sent a replica body over with the map.
